description: platformAutomerge is deliberately false: main is gated by a required `ci-pass` GitHub Ruleset status check, and native platform automerge can win the check-registration race and merge a red bump before the check lands. automerge/automergeType=pr stay on; Renovate's own PR-merge path waits for checks to report before merging.

customManagers.description: Update Makefile tool versions via inline renovate comments
Update helm chart versions pinned via inline renovate comments in scripts/*.sh (e.g. DAPR_VERSION in scripts/dapr.sh, a chart version var in scripts/components.sh) — VAR="${VAR:-value}" shell shape.

Update the Testcontainers Redis image tag pinned via an inline renovate comment above a Go const (e.g. // renovate: datasource=docker depName=redis above const testRedisImage = "redis:8-alpine"). Only the tag after the last colon is captured as currentValue.

packageRules.description: Wait 3 days before automerging major updates
Group GitHub Actions into one PR
Bump Go version in go.mod to latest patch

Group Go toolchain bumps into a single PR across managers — go.mod directives (4 modules), .mise.toml's go pin, and each service Dockerfile's golang base image must land together or CI deadlocks on a version-skew gate (see check-toolchain-alignment).

No customManager regex here captures a digest (Makefile tool images like TRIVY/PLANTUML, scripts/*.sh helm chart pins, *.go Testcontainers image tags), so docker:pinDigests can never render a write for them — disable it.

Disable tracking of the project's own first-party images — ghcr.io/andriykalashnykov/dapr-go/<service> images ARE published + cosign-signed to GHCR by this repo's own CI docker job, but Renovate must never open a PR bumping the project to its own next release tag.
